data.body: CHECKPOINT: Investigation complete. Found hardcoded 'batches of 5' references in 3 SKILL.md files: fix-bug/SKILL.md (lines 1014-1032), debug-everything/SKILL.md (lines 573, 628, 635), sprint/SKILL.md (lines 745, 758, 908, 1051). Eval files contain TDD RED-state tests that verify the old text is gone — those must NOT be modified. Beginning edits.
